info.value: M: I had an English test last Monday, but I did poorly on it. Lily, can you help me with my English?</br>W: Of course, John. What are your problems?</br>M: First, I can't speak English very well.</br>W: Why not join an English club every Friday afternoon?</br>M: OK, I'll try it. I'm not good at writing, either.</br>W: You can ask Lucy for help. She is good at it. She won the first prize in the writing competition last month.</br>M: Good idea. Thank you.</br>W: You’re welcome. I hope your English will improve soon.

std.value: He had the English test last Monday.

question.ask: 1. When did John have the English test?</br>(Last Monday. / Last Wednesday. / Last Friday.)
2. Who is good at writing?</br>(Lily. / Lucy. / John.)
